# Third-Party Code

This directory contains vendored third-party source snapshots used by this repository.

## Eigen

- Upstream repository: `https://gitlab.com/libeigen/eigen.git`
- Snapshot commit: `118ea02645ad89e9f1c44add27f81701e4561920`
- Snapshot date: `2026-04-11`

The copy under `third_party/eigen/` is committed as a plain source snapshot for reproducible builds.
It is not tracked as a Git submodule.

Please keep Eigen's upstream license files when updating this snapshot.
